calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-31-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Renee Przybylski, Esq. for Petitioner: Gisselle Shepherd, present as Guardian at litem for: Steven Shepherd, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $2,745.10
Unpaid Medical Expenses $1,430.00
Costs $1,019.62
A net balance of $6,805.28 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, Willow Pass Road, Concord, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
